title: Geo Tracer
description: Chunk Tracer is an addon for CC:Tweaked that allows you to get more information about the geographics around you.
body:
Geo Tracer – Advanced Block & Chunk Scanner for Minecraft


Description:
Geo Tracer is a powerful utility mod for Minecraft that allows players to analyze and scan their world efficiently. With Geo Tracer, you can:

Retrieve block information at any position in the world.

Scan rectangular areas, cubes, or spherical regions for blocks.

Get detailed block counts in a radius, including non-air blocks only.

Inspect chunks on the surface or within a region.

Designed for modpack creators, world explorers, and technical players, Geo Tracer provides accurate world data while keeping performance in mind. Whether you want to map resources, plan builds, or debug world generation, Geo Tracer gives you precise control over chunk and block scanning.

Features:

getBlockAtPos(x, y, z) – Returns the block at a specific coordinate.

getBlocksInRect(startX, startY, startZ, endX, endY, endZ) – Scans small areas for non-air blocks.

getBlocksOnSurfaceInChunk(BlockX, BlockZ) – Finds top blocks of a chunk.

getCubeFromRadius(x, y, z, radius) – Scans a cubic region around a point.

getSphereFromRadius(x, y, z, radius) – Scans a spherical region around a point.

Why Geo Tracer?
Geo Tracer is designed to be lightweight, efficient, and easy to integrate with other mods like ComputerCraft or CC:Tweaked. It allows detailed analysis of your world while respecting Minecraft’s performance limits.

Disclaimer:
Geo Tracer is a utility mod. It does not modify gameplay or provide unfair advantages in multiplayer. All functionality is aimed at technical exploration and building efficiency.
